title: On general Caffarelli-Kohn-Nirenberg type inequalities involving non-doubling weights in the case of $p=1$
summary:
We study the Caffarelli-Kohn-Nirenberg type inequalities in the case of $p=1$ and generalize them adopting weight functions
  $w(|x|)$ on $R^n$ with $w(t)$ in ${W}(R_+)$. Here ${W}(R_+)$ is a general class of weight functions on $R_+$ including non-doubling weights like $e^{1/t}$ and $e^{-1/t}$.

AI.tldr: 将Caffarelli-Kohn-Nirenberg型不等式推广到p=1情形，并采用包括非加倍权重在内的广义权重函数类
AI.motivation: 研究Caffarelli-Kohn-Nirenberg型不等式在p=1时的推广，考虑更广泛的权重函数类，特别是包含非加倍权重（如指数型权重）的情况
AI.techniques: 使用广义权重函数类W(R_+)，包含非加倍权重；可能涉及Hardy型不等式、权重函数分析、函数空间理论
AI.main_theorems: 建立了p=1时Caffarelli-Kohn-Nirenberg型不等式的推广形式，适用于包含指数型非加倍权重的广义权重函数类
AI.significance: 扩展了经典Caffarelli-Kohn-Nirenberg不等式的适用范围，为处理非加倍权重提供了理论框架，在偏微分方程和函数空间理论中有应用价值

title: Unveiling Explicit Patterns: Exact Steady States and Stability in a Confined Chemotaxis Model
summary: Inspired by Carrillo-Li-Wang's work [Proc. London Math. Soc., 2021] on stationary solutions to the singular Keller-Segel system, this paper presents a novel family of explicit steady-state solutions for the same model on a bounded interval, expressed in terms of trigonometric and hyperbolic functions. Under Dirichlet boundary conditions and within a biologically stable parameter regime, these solutions, including singular types such as secant and cosecant, are rigorously derived and analyzed. Their stability is established via energy methods, yielding precise thresholds for pattern persistence. These results provide valuable benchmarks for numerical validation and offer insights into boundary-driven pattern formation.

AI.tldr: 提出奇异Keller-Segel系统在有界区间上的一族显式稳态解，包括正割和余割等奇异类型，并分析其稳定性。
AI.motivation: 受Carrillo-Li-Wang关于奇异Keller-Segel系统稳态解研究的启发，本文旨在寻找该模型在有界区间上的显式稳态解，以提供数值验证的基准并理解边界驱动的模式形成。
AI.techniques: 使用能量方法分析稳定性，通过三角函数和双曲函数构造显式解，在Dirichlet边界条件和生物稳定参数体系下进行严格推导。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了奇异Keller-Segel系统在有界区间上的一族显式稳态解，包括正割和余割等奇异类型，并给出了模式持续性的精确阈值条件。
AI.significance: 为数值模拟提供了重要基准，揭示了边界条件在模式形成中的作用，对理解生物系统中的自组织现象有重要意义。

title: Existence of global solutions to the Fokas-Lenells equation with arbitrary spectral singularities
summary:
We establish the global existence of solutions to the Fokas-Lenells equation for any initial data in a weighted Sobolev space $H^{3}(\mathbb{R})\cap H^{2,1}(\mathbb{R})$.This result removes all spectral restrictions on the initial data required in our previous work.
  The proof primarily relies on the inverse scattering transform formulated as new Riemann-Hilbert problems and Zhou's $L^{2}$-Sobolev bijectivity theory.

AI.tldr: 建立了Fokas-Lenells方程在加权Sobolev空间中的全局解存在性，消除了先前工作中的谱限制条件
AI.motivation: Fokas-Lenells方程是可积系统的重要模型，先前研究需要初始数据的谱限制条件，本文旨在消除这些限制，建立更一般的全局存在性结果
AI.techniques: 采用逆散射变换方法，构造新的Riemann-Hilbert问题，并结合Zhou的L²-Sobolev双射理论
AI.main_theorems: 证明了对于任意属于加权Sobolev空间H³(ℝ)∩H²,¹(ℝ)的初始数据，Fokas-Lenells方程存在全局解
AI.significance: 显著改进了先前结果，完全消除了谱限制条件，为Fokas-Lenells方程的全局适定性理论提供了更完整的基础

title: Shock Formation for Compressible Euler Equations on $\mathbb{S}^2$
summary: In this paper, we prove the finite-time shock formation for the compressible Euler equations on the two-dimensional sphere $\mathbb{S}^2$. In contrast to the flat Euclidean case $\mathbb{R}^2$, the geometry of $\mathbb S^2$ imposes new difficulties, and the fluid dynamics are affected by the curved background. To overcome these challenges, we modify the existing modulation method and employ a set of carefully constructed, time-dependent coordinates that precisely track the shock formation on $\mathbb{S}^2$. In particular, we first perform a time-dependent rotation of $\mathbb S^2$, then apply the stereographic projection to the sphere, straighten the steepening shock front, and finally construct shock-adapted coordinates. In the shock-adapted coordinates, the compressible Euler equations on $\mathbb{S}^2$ can be recast into a form suitable for self-similar analysis. Within this framework, we implement a detailed bootstrap argument and establish global well-posedness for the self-similar system. After transferring these results back to the original physical system, we thereby demonstrate the finite-time shock formation on $\mathbb{S}^2$.

AI.tldr: 证明了二维球面S²上可压缩欧拉方程的有限时间激波形成
AI.motivation: 研究弯曲几何背景（球面S²）对流体动力学的影响，特别是与平坦欧几里得空间R²相比，几何曲率如何影响激波形成过程
AI.techniques: 改进的调制方法、构造时间依赖坐标系统（包括球面旋转、球极投影、激波前沿拉直、激波适应坐标）、自相似分析、详细的自举论证
AI.main_theorems: 证明了S²上可压缩欧拉方程的有限时间激波形成，建立了自相似系统的全局适定性，并将结果转换回原始物理系统
AI.significance: 首次在弯曲几何背景（球面）上严格证明了激波形成，为理解几何曲率对流体动力学奇点形成的影响提供了理论基础，扩展了激波形成理论的应用范围

title: Solutions with clustering concentration layers to the Ambrosetti-Prodi type problem
summary: We consider the following Ambrosetti-Prodi type problem \begin{equation}\label{e50} \left\{\begin{array}{ll} -div (A(x)\nabla u)=|u|^p-t\mathbfΨ(x), &\mbox{in $Ω$,} \\ u=0, & \mbox{on $\partial Ω$}, \end{array} \right. \end{equation} where $Ω\subset \mathbb{R}^2$, $t>0$, $p>3$ and $\mathbfΨ$ is an eigenfunction corresponding to the first eigenvalue of the following operator \[\mathfrak{L}(u)=-div (A(x)\nabla u).\] Moreover, $A(x)=\{A_{ij}(x)\}_{2\times 2}$ is a symmetric positive defined matrix function. Let $Γ\subset Ω$ be a closed curve and also a non-degenerate critical point of the functional \[\mathcal{K}(Γ)=\int_Γ\mathbfΨ^{\frac{p+3}{2p}}dvol_{\mathfrak{g}},\] where $\mathfrak{g}(X,Y)=\langle A^*X,Y\rangle$ is a Riemannian metric on $\mathbb{R}^2$ and $A^*$ is the adjoint matrix for $A$. We prove that there exists a sequence of $t=t_l\to +\infty$ such that this problem has solutions $u_{t_l}$ with clustering concentration layers directed along $Γ$.

AI.tldr: 证明了Ambrosetti-Prodi型问题存在解序列，其浓度层沿给定曲线Γ聚集
AI.motivation: 研究二维区域上具有非对称项的非线性椭圆方程Ambrosetti-Prodi型问题，探索解在参数趋于无穷时的集中现象
AI.techniques: 使用变分方法、Lyapunov-Schmidt约化、集中紧性原理，结合Riemannian几何工具分析浓度层结构
AI.main_theorems: 存在参数序列t_l→+∞使得问题有解u_{t_l}，其浓度层沿曲线Γ聚集，且Γ是泛函K(Γ)的非退化临界点
AI.significance: 扩展了Ambrosetti-Prodi问题的集中现象理论，建立了非线性椭圆方程解与Riemannian几何中临界曲线的联系

title: Pohožaev identity and the existence of normalized ground state solutions for variable exponent problems
summary: In this article, we investigate normalized solutions for nonlinear problems involving variable exponents. To the best of our knowledge, normalized solutions have not been previously studied in this setting, and our results appear to be new. A key difficulty is that the standard scaling argument, which is important in the classical normalized solution approach, is no longer available in the variable exponent setup. To address this, we work with a constrained variational framework and establish the existence of a ground state solution. We further show that these solutions are $C^{1,α}_{loc}(\mathbb{R}^N)$. Finally, we derive a Poho\v zaev-type identity adapted to the variable exponent structure in $\mathbb{R}^N$, which is used to prove that the solution is a ground state.

AI.tldr: 研究了变指数非线性问题的归一化解，首次在该框架下建立了基态解的存在性和正则性。
AI.motivation: 变指数非线性问题中的归一化解尚未被研究，标准缩放方法在变指数框架下失效，需要新的数学工具来处理这一挑战。
AI.techniques: 采用约束变分框架，建立基态解存在性；使用局部正则性理论证明解的正则性；推导适用于变指数结构的Pohožaev型恒等式。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 在变指数框架下存在归一化的基态解；2) 解具有局部C^{1,α}正则性；3) 建立了变指数结构的Pohožaev恒等式用于证明基态性质。
AI.significance: 首次将归一化解理论扩展到变指数领域，克服了标准缩放方法的限制，为变指数非线性问题的研究开辟了新方向。

title: Local well-posedness of the skew mean curvature flow for large data
summary: The skew mean curvature flow is an evolution equation for $d$ dimensional ma\-nifolds embedded in $\mathbb{R}^{d+2}$ (or more generally, in a Riemannian manifold). It can be viewed as a Schrödinger analogue of the mean curvature flow, or alternatively as a quasilinear version of the Schrödinger Map equation. In this article, we prove large data local well-posedness in low-regularity Sobolev spaces for the skew mean curvature flow in dimension $d\geq 2$. This is achieved by introducing several new ideas: (i) a time discretization method to establish the existence of smooth solutions, (ii) constructing the orthonormal frame by a parallel transport method and a lifting criterion, (iii) introducing intrinsic fractional function spaces $X^s\subset H^s$ on a noncompact manifold for any $s>\frac{d}{2}$, such that the $X^s$-norm of the second fundamental form can be propagated well along the quasilinear Schrödinger flow, (iv) deriving a difference equation to prove the uniqueness result for solutions $F\in C^2$, which is independent in the choices of gauge. Our method turns out to be more robust for large data problem.

AI.tldr: 证明了高维(d≥2)斜平均曲率流在大数据低正则性Sobolev空间中的局部适定性
AI.motivation: 斜平均曲率流是嵌入在ℝ^{d+2}中d维流形的演化方程，可视为平均曲率流的Schrödinger类比或Schrödinger映射方程的半线性版本，需要研究其在大数据情况下的适定性问题
AI.techniques: 时间离散化方法、平行传输法构造正交标架、提升准则、在非紧流形上引入内蕴分数阶函数空间X^s、推导独立于规范选择的差分方程
AI.main_theorems: 证明了d≥2维斜平均曲率流在低正则性Sobolev空间中的大数据局部适定性，包括光滑解的存在性、唯一性和解的正则性传播
AI.significance: 为斜平均曲率流建立了稳健的适定性理论框架，发展了处理拟线性Schrödinger流的新方法，对几何流和Schrödinger型方程的研究有重要理论意义

title: Principal eigenvalues and asymptotic behavior for the weighted $p$-Laplacian with Robin boundary conditions on exterior domains
summary: The spectral theory of the p-Laplacian is well developed for classical Dirichlet and Neumann boundary conditions, but the transitional Robin regime on exterior domains remains largely unexplored. This paper studies a weighted p-Laplacian eigenvalue problem with Robin boundary conditions on the exterior of the unit ball in Euclidean space of dimension N, with N greater than p. The weight function belongs to a critical Lorentz class and decays at infinity. Under natural assumptions on the weight, we prove the existence, uniqueness, simplicity, and isolation of a positive principal eigenvalue and establish local first-order regularity of the associated eigenfunction. We analyze the dependence of the principal eigenvalue on the Robin parameter and recover the Neumann and Dirichlet limits as the parameter approaches zero and infinity, respectively. The far-field behavior of the eigenfunction exhibits a universal algebraic decay rate that is independent of the Robin parameter, while the near-boundary structure displays an explicit scaling with respect to the parameter. We further investigate the gradient behavior of the eigenfunction, showing the existence of a unique critical radius and providing quantitative bounds on both the critical radius and the boundary value in terms of the Robin parameter. The main contribution of this work is the derivation of unified gradient estimates that connect the near-boundary and far-field regions through a characteristic length scale determined by the Robin parameter, yielding a global description of how boundary effects penetrate into the exterior domain.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了单位球外部区域上带临界权重的p-Laplacian Robin特征值问题，建立了主特征值的存在性、唯一性、简单性和孤立性，并分析了特征函数在边界附近的局部结构和无穷远处的衰减行为。
AI.motivation: p-Laplacian的谱理论在经典Dirichlet和Neumann边界条件下已有充分发展，但在外部区域上的Robin过渡机制仍缺乏研究。本文旨在填补这一空白，研究单位球外部区域上带临界权重的p-Laplacian Robin特征值问题，其中N>p，权重函数属于临界Lorentz类且在无穷远处衰减。
AI.techniques: 使用临界Lorentz空间理论、变分方法、特征值问题的存在性理论、正则性理论、渐近分析方法，以及连接边界附近区域和无穷远区域的统一梯度估计技术。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了正主特征值的存在性、唯一性、简单性和孤立性；建立了相关特征函数的局部一阶正则性；分析了主特征值对Robin参数的依赖性，并在参数趋于零和无穷时分别恢复Neumann和Dirichlet极限；揭示了特征函数在无穷远处的代数衰减率与Robin参数无关，而边界附近结构则显式依赖于参数；证明了梯度存在唯一临界半径，并给出了临界半径和边界值关于Robin参数的定量估计。
AI.significance: 首次系统研究了外部区域上p-Laplacian的Robin特征值问题，建立了连接边界效应和无穷远行为的统一理论框架，揭示了边界参数如何通过特征长度尺度影响整个外部区域，为理解非线性椭圆算子在过渡边界条件下的谱性质提供了新视角。

title: Obstacle problems for the elastic flow and related topics
comment: 22 pages, 3 figures, to appear in 2025 MATRIX Annals
summary: In this note, we study an obstacle problem for the elastic flow. We prove the local-in-time existence of weak solutions and discuss their relation to classical solutions when additional regularity is obtained. Related results concerning obstacle problems for the bending energy are also collected.

AI.tldr: 证明了弹性流障碍问题的局部弱解存在性，并讨论了与经典解的关系
AI.motivation: 研究弹性流（elastic flow）的障碍问题，这类问题在材料科学和几何分析中有重要应用，涉及弹性杆或薄膜在障碍约束下的运动
AI.techniques: 使用弱解理论、变分方法、能量估计和正则性理论，可能涉及抛物型偏微分方程的分析技巧
AI.main_theorems: 1. 弹性流障碍问题的局部弱解存在性定理；2. 弱解在获得额外正则性时与经典解的关系；3. 弯曲能量障碍问题的相关结果汇总
AI.significance: 为弹性流障碍问题建立了理论基础，扩展了抛物型障碍问题的研究范围，为材料科学中的约束弹性系统提供了数学框架

title: Stability for the inverse random potential scattering problem
summary: This paper is concerned with an inverse random potential problem for the Schrödinger equation. The random potential is assumed to be a generalized Gaussian random function, whose covariance operator is a classical pseudo-differential operator. For the direct problem, the meromorphic continuation of the resolvent of the Schrödinger operator with rough potentials is investigated, which yields the well-posedness of the direct scattering problem and a Born series expansion. For the inverse problem, we derive a probabilistic stability estimate for determining the principle symbol of the covariance operator of the random potential. The stability result provides an estimate of the probability for an event when the principle symbol can be quantitatively determined by a single realization of the multi-frequency backscattered far-field pattern. The analysis employs the ergodicity theory and quantitative analytic continuation principle.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了薛定谔方程中随机势的逆问题，通过多频背向散射远场模式单次实现来定量确定随机势协方差算子的主符号。
AI.motivation: 研究薛定谔方程中随机势的逆问题，其中随机势被建模为广义高斯随机函数，其协方差算子是经典伪微分算子。核心问题是如何通过散射数据恢复随机势的统计特性。
AI.techniques: 使用遍历性理论和定量解析延拓原理；研究薛定谔算子粗糙势的解析延拓；建立Born级数展开；推导概率稳定性估计。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 直接问题：证明了粗糙势薛定谔算子预解式的亚纯延拓，得到直接散射问题的适定性和Born级数展开；2. 逆问题：推导了确定随机势协方差算子主符号的概率稳定性估计，量化了通过单次多频背向散射远场模式实现定量确定的概率。
AI.significance: 为随机介质中的逆散射问题提供了新的理论框架，将确定性逆问题推广到随机情形，建立了通过单次实验数据恢复随机势统计特性的概率保证，在随机介质成像和不确定性量化中有重要应用。

title: Orbital stability of solitary waves for the Schr odinger-Boussinesq system
summary:
This paper studies the orbital stability of solitary waves for the following Schrödinger-Boussinesq system \begin{equation*} \begin{cases} { \begin{array}{ll} i\varepsilon_t+\varepsilon_{xx}=n\varepsilon+γ|\varepsilon|^2\varepsilon, \\ n_{tt}-n_{xx}+ αn_{xxxx}-β(n^2)_{xx}=|\varepsilon|^2_{xx},
  \end{array} } (t,x)\in \mathbb{R}^2. \end{cases} \end{equation*} By applying the abstract results and detailed spectral analysis, we obtain the orbital stability of solitary waves. The result can be regarded as an extension of the results of \cite{ F-P,H,W}.

AI.tldr: 该论文证明了Schrödinger-Boussinesq系统孤立波的轨道稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究Schrödinger-Boussinesq耦合系统的孤立波稳定性问题，该系统包含非线性薛定谔方程与Boussinesq型波动方程的耦合，具有重要的物理背景和数学意义
AI.techniques: 应用抽象稳定性理论框架，结合详细的谱分析技术，分析线性化算子的谱性质
AI.main_theorems: 证明了该系统孤立波的轨道稳定性，这是对前人工作（F-P, H, W）的推广和扩展
AI.significance: 为耦合非线性波系统的稳定性理论提供了新结果，对理解非线性波动力学和孤立子稳定性有重要理论价值

title: Qualitative properties of positive solutions to mixed local and nonlocal critical problems in $\mathbb{R}^n$
summary: We consider the following mixed local and non-local critical elliptic equation: \begin{equation*}\label{0.1} \left\{ \begin{array}{lll} -Δu+(-Δ)^su=λh u^{p}+u^{2^*-1}, &\text{in}\,\, \mathbb{R}^n, u>0, &\text {in} \,\, \mathbb{R}^n, \lim\limits_{|x|\to\infty} u(x) = 0, \end{array} \right. \end{equation*} where $n\geqslant4, \,\, p\in (0,2^*-1),\,\, 2^*:=\frac{2n}{n-2}$ and $h$ is a positive function. We first show the existence and regularity results of viscosity solutions to the above critical elliptic equation. More precisely, from \cite{Su-Xu} weak solutions are obtained and we prove they are indeed viscosity solutions and their regularity is: \( u \in C^α(\mathbb{R}^n) \) for $p\in(0,1);$ \( u \in C^{2,β}(\mathbb{R}^n) \) for $p\in [1, 2^*-1).$ Moreover, for $p\in [1, 2^*-1)$, these viscosity solutions are indeed classical ones and we then prove the existence of positive solutions with the qualitative properties such as the decay estimates and the radial symmetry.

AI.tldr: 研究混合局部与非局部临界椭圆方程的存在性、正则性及定性性质
AI.motivation: 研究混合局部与非局部算子的临界椭圆方程，这类方程在数学物理中有重要应用，特别是分数阶拉普拉斯算子与经典拉普拉斯算子的组合
AI.techniques: 使用粘性解理论、正则性理论、衰减估计和径向对称性分析
AI.main_theorems: 1. 证明弱解是粘性解；2. 建立正则性结果：p∈(0,1)时u∈C^α，p∈[1,2^*-1)时u∈C^{2,β}；3. 证明正解的存在性、衰减估计和径向对称性
AI.significance: 为混合局部与非局部临界椭圆方程提供了系统的解理论，扩展了经典椭圆方程的结果到分数阶情形

title: Wave propagation for 1-dimensional reaction-diffusion equation with nonzero random drift
comment: 56 pages, 3 figures, preliminary version. Comments are welcome!
summary: We consider the wave propagation for a reaction-diffusion equation on the real line, with a random drift and Fisher-Kolmogorov-Petrovskii-Piscounov (FKPP) type nonlinear reaction. We show that when the average drift is positive, the asymptotic wave fronts propagating to the positive and negative directions are both pushed in the negative direction, leading to the possibility that both wave fronts propagate toward negative infinity. Our proof is based on the Large Deviations Principle for diffusion processes in random environments, as well as an analysis of the Feynman-Kac formula. Such probabilistic arguments also reveal the underlying physical mechanism of the wave fronts formation: the drift acts as an external field that shifts the (quenched) free-energy reference level without altering the intrinsic fluctuation structure of the system.

AI.tldr: 证明了在具有随机漂移的FKPP反应扩散方程中，当平均漂移为正时，正负方向的波前都会向负方向传播
AI.motivation: 研究随机环境中反应扩散方程的波传播现象，特别关注随机漂移对FKPP型非线性反应方程波前传播方向的影响
AI.techniques: 使用随机环境中扩散过程的大偏差原理，结合Feynman-Kac公式的解析分析
AI.main_theorems: 当平均漂移为正时，正负方向的波前都向负方向传播，甚至可能同时向负无穷方向传播
AI.significance: 揭示了随机漂移作为外场对波前形成的内在物理机制：漂移改变了淬火自由能参考水平而不改变系统的本征涨落结构

title: Optimal Convergence Estimate of the Limit from Inverse Power Potential to Hard Sphere Boltzmann Equation
summary: The inverse power potential $U(r)=r^{-1/s}, 0<s<1$, generates the Boltzmann kernel $B^{s}=|v-v_*|^{1-4s} b_s(θ)$ with an angular singularity as $θ\to 0$. Jang-Kepka-Nota-Velázquez (2023) proved the limit $B^{s}\to \frac14|v-v_*|$ as $s\to 0$, as well as weak convergence of solutions based on this kernel convergence. In this work we establish the following sharp quantitative estimate: $$ |b_s(θ)-\tfrac14| \le C\, s\,θ^{-2-2s}. $$ In particular, this sharp estimate yields the optimal $O(s)$ convergence rate for solutions of the homogeneous Boltzmann equation with large initial data in suitable Sobolev spaces; i.e., for any $t\in[0,T]$, we have $$f^s(t)=f^0(t)+O(s),$$ quantified by the $L^1_k$ norm for $k\ge 2.$

AI.tldr: 建立了逆幂势Boltzmann核角部奇异性的最优定量估计，给出了齐次Boltzmann方程解的O(s)收敛速率
AI.motivation: 研究逆幂势$U(r)=r^{-1/s}$生成的Boltzmann核$B^s$在$s\to 0$极限下的定量收敛行为，此前Jang-Kepka-Nota-Velázquez (2023)已证明弱收敛，本文旨在建立最优定量估计
AI.techniques: 使用角部奇异性的精细分析，建立角部函数$b_s(θ)$与极限值$\frac14$之间的定量估计，结合Sobolev空间理论处理大初值问题
AI.main_theorems: 主要定理：$|b_s(θ)-\tfrac14| \le C\, s\,θ^{-2-2s}$，由此导出齐次Boltzmann方程解的最优收敛速率$f^s(t)=f^0(t)+O(s)$，在$L^1_k$范数下对$k\ge 2$成立
AI.significance: 为逆幂势Boltzmann方程的奇异极限提供了最优定量收敛结果，深化了对角部奇异性的理解，为相关渐近分析提供了精确工具

title: Nonlocal Dirichlet problems involving the Logarithmic $p$-Laplacian
summary: In this work, we show the existence of an unbounded sequence of minimax eigenvalues for the logarithmic $p$-Laplacian via the $\mathbb{Z}_2$-cohomological index of Fadell and Rabinowitz. As an application of these minimax eigenvalues and $p$-logarithmic Sobolev inequality proved in [4], we prove new existence results for nonlocal Dirichlet problems involving logarithmic $p$-Laplacian and nonlinearities with $p$-superlinear and subcritical growth at infinity.

AI.tldr: 证明了对数p-Laplacian存在无界序列的极小极大特征值，并应用于具有p-超线性次临界增长的非线性非局部Dirichlet问题
AI.motivation: 研究对数p-Laplacian的特征值问题，该算子是非局部算子，在分数阶p-Laplacian理论中具有重要意义。需要建立特征值的存在性理论，以应用于相关的非线性非局部Dirichlet问题。
AI.techniques: 使用Fadell和Rabinowitz的Z2-上同调指标理论构造极小极大特征值；结合p-对数Sobolev不等式；应用变分方法和临界点理论处理非线性问题。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对数p-Laplacian存在无界序列的极小极大特征值；2. 对具有p-超线性次临界增长的非线性项，证明了非局部Dirichlet问题的新存在性结果。
AI.significance: 扩展了对数p-Laplacian的特征值理论，为处理相关的非线性非局部问题提供了新的工具；结合p-对数Sobolev不等式，建立了特征值与非线性问题解存在性之间的联系。

title: Asymptotics for the spectrum of the Laplacian in thin bars with varying cross sections
summary: We consider spectral problems for Laplace operator in 3D rod structures with a small cross section of diameter $O(\varepsilon)$, $\varepsilon$ being a positive parameter. The boundary conditions are Dirichlet (Neumann, respectively) on the bases of this structure and Neumann on the lateral boundary. As $\varepsilon\to 0$, we show the convergence of the spectrum with conservation of the multiplicity towards that of a 1D spectral model with Dirichlet (Neumann, respectively) boundary conditions. This 1D model may arise in diffusion or vibrations models of nonhomogeneous media with different physical characteristics and it takes into account the geometry of the 3D domain. We deal with the low frequencies and the approach to eigenfunctions in the suitable Sobolev spaces is also outlined.

AI.tldr: 研究三维细长杆结构拉普拉斯算子的谱收敛问题，证明当截面直径趋于零时，谱收敛到一维模型谱
AI.motivation: 研究具有小截面的三维杆结构（截面直径O(ε)）中拉普拉斯算子的谱问题，分析当ε→0时谱的渐近行为，建立三维结构与一维简化模型之间的联系
AI.techniques: 渐近分析、谱收敛理论、Sobolev空间方法、边界层分析、变分方法
AI.main_theorems: 证明当ε→0时，三维杆结构的谱（带重数）收敛到一维模型的谱，该一维模型考虑了三维几何并具有相应的边界条件
AI.significance: 为细长结构中的谱问题提供严格的数学基础，连接三维物理模型与一维简化模型，在非均匀介质扩散和振动问题中有重要应用

title: Sharp pointwise convergence of Schrödinger mean with complex time in higher dimensions
summary: In this paper, we establish the almost everywhere convergence of solutions to the Schrödinger operator with complex time $ P_γf(x,t) $ in higher dimensions, under the assumption that the initial data $f$ belongs to the Sobolev space $ H^{s}(\mathbb{R}^d)$.

AI.tldr: 证明了高维复时间薛定谔算子解在Sobolev空间初值下的几乎处处收敛性
AI.motivation: 研究复时间薛定谔算子的收敛性问题，这是实时间薛定谔方程研究的自然推广，具有重要的理论意义
AI.techniques: 使用Sobolev空间理论、复分析方法、几乎处处收敛的经典技术，可能涉及调和分析和算子理论
AI.main_theorems: 证明了当初值f属于H^s(R^d)时，复时间薛定谔算子P_γf(x,t)在几乎处处意义下收敛
AI.significance: 将实时间薛定谔方程的收敛性结果推广到复时间情形，为复偏微分方程理论提供了新的收敛性结果

title: Low regularity well-posedness for two-dimensional hydroelastic waves
summary: We investigate the low regularity local well-posedness of two-dimensional irrotational deep hydroelastic waves. Building on the approach of Ifrim-Tataru [29] and Ai-Ifrim-Tataru [5], in particular by constructing a cubic modified energy that incorporates a paradifferential weight chosen carefully, we prove that the hydroelastic waves are locally well-posed in $\mathcal{H}^s$ for $s>\frac{3}{4}$.

AI.tldr: 证明了二维无旋深水弹性波在Sobolev空间$\mathcal{H}^s$中当$s>\frac{3}{4}$时的局部适定性
AI.motivation: 研究二维无旋深水弹性波的低正则性局部适定性问题，这是流体力学与弹性力学交叉领域的重要数学模型，涉及水波与弹性板的相互作用
AI.techniques: 基于Ifrim-Tataru和Ai-Ifrim-Tataru的方法，通过构造包含精心选择的拟微分权重的三次修正能量来建立适定性
AI.main_theorems: 证明了二维无旋深水弹性波在Sobolev空间$\mathcal{H}^s$中当$s>\frac{3}{4}$时是局部适定的
AI.significance: 将水波方程的低正则性适定性理论推广到弹性波情形，为研究水弹性动力学提供了严格的数学基础，扩展了拟微分能量方法的应用范围

title: Decay of Mass of the Solution to the Cauchy Problem of the p-Laplacian with Absorption on Infinite Graphs
summary: We consider the Cauchy problem for the nonstationary discrete p-Laplacian with inhomogeneous density \r{ho}(x) on an infinite graph which supports the Sobolev inequality. For nonnegative solutions when p > 2, we prove the precise rate of stabilization in time, provided \r{ho}(x) is a non-power function. When p > 2 and \r{ho}(x) goes to zero fast enough, we prove the universal bound. Our technique relies on suitable energy inequalities and a new embedding result.

AI.tldr: 研究了无限图上非平稳离散p-Laplacian方程的Cauchy问题，证明了当p>2时非负解的精确时间稳定化速率和通用界
AI.motivation: 研究无限图上具有非齐次密度ρ(x)的非平稳离散p-Laplacian方程的Cauchy问题，该图支持Sobolev不等式。主要关注解的时间渐近行为，特别是当p>2时非负解的稳定化速率
AI.techniques: 使用合适的能量不等式和新的嵌入结果，通过能量估计方法分析解的渐近行为
AI.main_theorems: 1. 当p>2且ρ(x)是非幂函数时，证明了非负解的精确时间稳定化速率；2. 当p>2且ρ(x)足够快趋于零时，证明了通用界的存在性
AI.significance: 扩展了离散p-Laplacian方程在无限图上的渐近分析理论，为具有非齐次密度的离散抛物型方程提供了新的稳定化结果，在离散分析和图上的偏微分方程理论中有重要应用

title: Long time dynamics of space periodic water waves
comment: Accepted for the ICM2026 Proceedings to be published by SIAM
summary: We review recent advances regarding the long-time dynamics of space-periodic water waves, focusing on 1) bifurcation of quasi-periodic solutions, both standing and traveling; 2) long-time well-posedness results; 3) modulational instability of Stokes waves. These results rely on unconventional approaches to KAM and Birkhoff normal form theories for Hamiltonian quasi-linear PDEs and symplectic Kato perturbation theory for separated eigenvalues of reversible and Hamiltonian operators.

AI.tldr: 综述了空间周期水波长期动力学的最新进展，包括拟周期解分岔、长时间适定性及Stokes波调制不稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究空间周期水波的长期动力学行为，这是流体力学和数学物理中的重要问题，涉及水波的稳定性、分岔和长时间演化
AI.techniques: 非常规KAM理论、Birkhoff正规形理论（针对Hamilton拟线性PDE）、辛Kato摄动理论（针对可逆和Hamilton算子的分离特征值）
AI.main_theorems: 1) 拟周期解（驻波和行波）的分岔；2) 长时间适定性结果；3) Stokes波的调制不稳定性
AI.significance: 为水波长期动力学提供了系统的数学理论框架，将KAM理论和正规形方法推广到拟线性PDE，对流体力学稳定性理论和动力系统有重要贡献
